meta_title: Integrations — M-Pesa, Shopify, Xero & 25 More | AskBiz
meta_description: AskBiz connects to M-Pesa, MTN Money, Airtel, Shopify, Xero, QuickBooks, Stripe, Meta Ads and 25+ more tools. One tap to connect — no developer needed.
og_title: AskBiz Integrations — M-Pesa, Shopify, Xero & More
og_description: Connect M-Pesa, MTN Mobile Money, Airtel, Shopify, Xero, QuickBooks, Stripe, and 25+ more tools. One tap to connect. No developer or IT team needed.
hero_subtitle: {count}+ integrations — eCommerce, accounting, ad networks, and payment processors. Connects in under 10 minutes. New platforms added every month.
request_desc: We add new integrations every month. Request your tool and we'll prioritise based on demand.
slug_cta_sub: Start your 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
desc_shopify: Connect your Shopify store and see revenue, orders, products, customers, and refunds — automatically.
desc_amazon: Connect Amazon Seller Central to track sales, BSR, advertising spend, and FBA inventory across all your markets.
desc_xero: Connect Xero to see your P&L, cash position, outstanding invoices, and key financial ratios — updated daily.
desc_quickbooks: Connect QuickBooks to track profit and loss, cash flow, outstanding invoices, and expenses — in one view.
desc_stripe: Connect Stripe to track MRR, churn, payment volume, and failed payments — the essential SaaS and eCommerce metrics.
desc_meta_ads: Connect Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram) to track ad spend, ROAS, CPM, CPC, and conversion performance by campaign.
desc_google_ads: Connect Google Ads to track spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, and ROAS across all your campaigns.
desc_woocommerce: Connect WooCommerce to see orders, revenue, products, and customers synced daily from your WordPress store.
desc_paystack: Connect Paystack to track payment volume, transaction success rates, and revenue from African markets.
desc_flutterwave: Connect Flutterwave to monitor payment collections, settlements, and cross-border transactions in real time.
